allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|npm|nvm' })

PowerShell(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd"; Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\nvm"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node' } | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node' } | Select-Object FullName)
